playbook.intent: Coordinate a flagship launch across product, engineering, design, marketing, sales, and support: from a launch tier decision through pre-launch readiness, day-zero execution, and a 30-day post-launch review.
playbook.scope: Coordinate a flagship launch across product, engineering, design, marketing, sales, and support: from a launch tier decision through pre-launch readiness, day-zero execution, and a 30-day post-launch review.

success-criteria.criterion: Day-zero ran with no unresolved P0 incidents

stage.name: Launch tier decision
stage.intent: Classify the launch into a tier so the org spends proportional energy.

tasks.task: Score the launch on impact, novelty, audience breadth, and risk
Map the score to a launch tier (T1 flagship vs T2 medium vs T3 minor)
Write a one-paragraph rationale

stage.decision-gate: Advance once tier is named and at least one VP signs off.

stage.name: Readiness
stage.intent: Bring product, eng, design, marketing, sales, support, and ops to a green readiness check.

tasks.task: Stand up a launch RACI
Run a readiness checklist per function
Identify and burn down launch blockers daily

outputs.output: Readiness checklist with green/red status per function

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every function reports green or has an owner working a red item with a date.

stage.name: Messaging
stage.intent: Lock positioning, differentiators, and the explainer story.

tasks.task: Run a 30-min positioning workshop
Draft the one-line, one-paragraph, and one-page explainers
Pressure-test against the top 2 competitors

stage.decision-gate: Advance when messaging passes a sales-team 'can I sell this in 90 seconds' read.

stage.name: Channel plan
stage.intent: Pick the launch surfaces and sequence them.

tasks.task: Choose channels (PH, HN, IH, ASO, owned email, partner relays)
Stagger the channel hits across day -7 → +14
Brief each channel owner on copy and timing

outputs.output: Channel plan with owners and dates

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each channel has a named owner and a draft asset.

stage.name: Pre-launch dry run
stage.intent: Rehearse day-zero end-to-end before the spotlight.

tasks.task: Test the signup → first-value loop with 5 strangers
Rehearse the day-zero ops timeline
Verify support has triage scripts ready

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the dry-run hits no P0 surprises.

stage.name: Day zero
stage.intent: Run the launch live with a war room.

tasks.task: Open a war room with on-call from product + eng + marketing + support
Post the launch in scheduled order
Triage incoming feedback in real time

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the launch window closes with no unresolved P0 incidents.

stage.name: 30-day review
stage.intent: Read what happened against the launch-tier expectations.

tasks.task: Pull metrics vs pre-launch targets
Run a structured post-launch retro
Decide go-deeper, hold, or sunset

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written post-launch verdict at day 30.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content major-launch-gtm-coordination --format md, agent: faion get-content major-launch-gtm-coordination --format context, json: faion get-content major-launch-gtm-coordination --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
